input.background: For the illustrative data, we have established \(\bar{x}=603.64, \bar{y}=20.55, s_X=378.451, s_Y=11.725\) and \(r=0.737\).
input.question: Calculate the slope coefficient \(b\) using the correlation \(r\) and standard deviations \(s_Y\) and \(s_X\).

mean_x.description: The mean value of variable X.

mean_y.description: The mean value of variable Y.

std_dev_x.description: The standard deviation of variable X.

std_dev_y.description: The standard deviation of variable Y.

correlation_r.description: The correlation coefficient between variables X and Y.
